testcase.name: test_process_autopost_endpoint_exists
testcase.error: backend/tests/test_finance_features.py:42: in auth_data assert response.status_code == 200, f"Registration failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Registration failed: {"detail":"Email already registered"} E assert 400 == 200 E + where 400 = <Response [400]>.status_code
